name: Orange Rose & White Hydrangea Bridal Bouquet
nameSwahili: Shada la Maua la Harusi — Waridi za Machungwa
description: Handcrafted silk bridal bouquet featuring deep orange roses, ivory hydrangeas, calla-lily accents and soft green fern. Warm, romantic palette perfect for an autumn-toned wedding or a bride who wants a statement of colour against a white gown. Reusable — preserve it as a keepsake long after the day.
